title: Cozy Holiday Card
summary: Storybook winter scene with a snowy cabin, woodland animals, and a single bright star.
prompt: A cozy winter holiday card. A small woodland scene: a tiny cabin with warm yellow window light, snow-covered pine trees, a fox and a rabbit standing in fresh snow looking at the cabin. Soft falling snowflakes, deep blue twilight sky with a single bright star. Painted in a storybook illustration style with warm muted colors. "Warmest Wishes" in handwritten script at the bottom.
